ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type (e.g., apparel, footwear) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed product specifications in JSON format */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for filtering */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "media_types" TEXT /* Types of media associated with the product in JSON format */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating from customer reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product type is active */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (image, video, etc.) */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for accessibility */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "not_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as not helpful */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "shipped_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivered_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_tag_mapping" (
  "product_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product tag mapping */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_tag_mapping_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_tag_mapping_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES product_tags ("tag_id")
)
